items.title: Spotify expands parent-managed accounts to users on its free tier
items.summary: The feature was previously only available to paid subscribers.

items.title: India bets billions on breaking China’s grip on smartphone manufacturing
items.summary: New Delhi announced a $6.5 billion smartphone manufacturing program and a $13.3 billion semiconductor push to deepen India's electronics supply chain.

items.title: US charges Russian ‘bulletproof’ web hosts over cyberattacks that netted $62M from cybercrime victims
items.summary: The 2024 indictment, now unsealed, accuses three Russians and two web hosts of aiding hackers and profiting from cybercrime.

items.title: Anthropic, Blackstone bet the next trillion-dollar AI business is implementation, not just models
items.summary: Anthropic-backed Ode launches as AI labs bet that embedding forward-deployed engineers inside enterprises is the key to accelerating enterprise AI adoption.

items.title: Rime picks up $24M Series A to help enterprises field customer calls
items.summary: Rime is handling over 100 million calls each month across multiple companies.

items.title: Reelful’s AI turns your camera roll into short-form videos for social media
items.summary: The app is designed for people who want to create social content, but find traditional video editing tools too complex or time-consuming.

items.title: Indian AI coding startup Emergent becomes a unicorn with $130M Series C
items.summary: The startup has reached a $120 million annualized revenue run rate and more than 200,000 paying customers.

items.title: Vint Cerf is working on a plan to unleash AI agents on the open internet
items.summary: The guy behind TCP/IP is working on a standard for identifying AI agents in the wild.

items.title: Why Realta Fusion is building a fusion reactor at an old hot dog factory
items.summary: An old Oscar Mayer factory in Wisconsin will become America's latest fusion power research and development hub.

items.title: Backed by $60M in funding, Oak steps out of stealth to fix the identity mess that AI agents are making worse
items.summary: Co-founded by serial entrepreneur Shai Morag, Israeli identity management startup Oak is emerging out of stealth with $60 million in seed funding.

items.title: A SpaceX vet raised $65M to pull wire harnesses out of the Cold War era
items.summary: Someone has to bundle all the wires that go into rockets, missiles, and satellites.

items.title: OpenAI researcher Miles Wang in talks to launch AI drug discovery startup valued at $2B
items.summary: The funding discussions point to investor interest in applying AI to make breakthroughs in life sciences.

items.title: Lorde says AI glasses are ‘not sexy’
items.summary: "Increasingly in our world, it gets harder and harder to know what is real," Lorde said onstage.

items.title: OpenAI’s first hardware device is reportedly a screenless speaker that can move
items.summary: The device is weirdly described as involving "mechanical elements that can move on their own" and the Bloomberg report includes the detail that the device is designed to "feel like a companion and bec...

items.title: OpenAI pushes back on Apple trade secret lawsuit
items.summary: OpenAI has issued another statement on the lawsuit, this time suggesting it lacks merit.

items.title: OpenAI’s new flagship model deletes files on its own, people keep warning
items.summary: A number of social media posts claim that GPT-5.6 Sol deleted files and data without warning. OpenAI had basically disclosed the problem in June.

items.title: Apple opens its new Siri AI to everyone with the iOS 27 public beta
items.summary: If you’ve been waiting to try Apple’s revamped Siri without installing a developer beta, you now can. The company on Tuesday released the iOS 27 public beta, giving iPhone owners early access to its A...

items.title: Anthropic’s newest ad is creeping people out
items.summary: Anthropic has consistently attempted to depict itself as the ethical foil to other AI companies. This latest marketing stunt — which leans into criticism of AI as a way to make Anthropic seem aware of...

items.title: The founder of Hinge raised $18M to build a new AI dating service, Overtone
items.summary: Overtone describes itself as "a voice- and audio-forward service, enabled by AI, that provides highly curated introductions."

items.title: Lucid Motors denies report it’s considering bankruptcy
items.summary: The company said the "rumors are completely false" after its stock sank more than 50% on a report that it was weighing the option.
